question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which pair of forces are balanced?

options.label: A
options.text: The weight of the book pushing down and the normal force of the table pushing up

options.label: B
options.text: The weight of the book and the friction between the book and table

options.label: C
options.text: The normal force pushing up and air resistance

options.label: D
options.text: The weight of the table and the weight of the book

explanation: When an object is at rest, the upward normal force from the table exactly balances the downward weight force. These equal and opposite forces mean the book does not accelerate.
